        $7547 = 7 \times (1000 + 70 + 2) + 3 = 7 \times 1072 + 3$.
        Alternatively, $754 - 2 \times 7 = 754 - 14 = 740$. $740 / 7$: $700 + 40$. $40 = 5 \times 7 + 5$. Remainder is 5.

        $7547 \div 7$:
        $7 \div 7 = 1$, remainder 0. (7000)
        $5 \div 7 = 0$, remainder 5. (50)
        $54 \div 7 = 7$, remainder 5. (57)
        $57 \div 7 = 8$, remainder 1.
        So, $7547 = 7 \times 1078 + 1$. Not divisible by 7.

    *   **By 11**: Alternating sum: $7 - 4 + 5 - 7 = 3 + (-2) = 1$. Not divisible by 11.
    *   **By 13**: $7547 \div 13$.

        Bring down 4: 104. $13 \times 8 = 104$.
        Bring down 7: 7.
        $7547 = 13 \times 580 + 7$. Not divisible by 13.

        $7547 = 17 \times 443 + 16$. Not divisible by 17.

        $19 \times 7 = 133$. $137 - 133 = 4$.

    *   **By 23**: $7547 \div 23$.
